description:
After fz-ty1.pip.4, FnDef carries extern_params: Vec<String> and extern_ret_name: Option<String>. Update ir_lower.rs zeroth pass to call extern_ty_from_name on these strings directly, with no token re-parsing.

## What to change

ir_lower.rs, zeroth pass (lines ~472-503):
  - Remove any code that extracts string values from token sequences.
  - Call extern_ty_from_name(param_name) directly.
  - Call extern_ty_from_name(ret_name) directly for return type.

## Acceptance
- cargo clippy -- -D warnings passes.
- All tests pass.
- One commit referencing fz-ty1.pip.5.
title: fz-ty1.pip.5: ir_lower zeroth pass uses extern_params strings directly
